meta.title: "It Never Happened Before" 5 Minutes from Richard Clarke Keynote
meta.description: 5 minute clip from Richard Clarke's Keynote from S4x17 directly addresses the challenge of getting management to spend money on issues or problems "that have never happened before". This is a great lead in to his book Finding Cassandras. He points to setting industry goals, and his view that regulation is required.
